'''Hidu Rezodar''' was a gangster from [[Phaeda/Legends|Phaeda]] who imprisoned bounty hunter [[Sintas Vel]] in [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]]. Rezodar was killed shortly after Sintas' imprisonment, and the slab of carbonite containing Sintas Vel was held in storage by Phaedan authorities for almost forty years.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]'' {{Mo}}
